# hy-home.docker LLM Wiki

## Purpose

This file is the repo-local LLM entrypoint for `hy-home.docker`. It points agents to canonical tracked source files and reference docs without replacing the repository runtime truth.

## Canonical Entry Points

- [Repository overview](README.md)
- [Agent execution rules](AGENTS.md)
- [Documentation index](docs/README.md)
- [Agent governance hub](docs/00.agent-governance/README.md)
- [Infrastructure index](infra/README.md)
- [Script and validator index](scripts/README.md)
- [Secret handling index](secrets/README.md)
- [LLM Wiki generated index](docs/90.references/llm-wiki/llm-wiki-index.md)
- [LLM Wiki repository map](docs/90.references/llm-wiki/repository-map.md)

## Boundaries

- Use tracked source files as the evidence boundary.
- Runtime truth remains in `infra/`, `scripts/`, registry JSON files, Docker Compose files, and governance docs.
- Do not include or disclose secret values, credentials, private keys, tokens, shell history, or log databases.
- Treat `secrets/` as path and policy context only unless a direct user request explicitly requires otherwise.
- Exclude `volumes/`, generated or minified artifacts, and dependency trees from LLM Wiki evidence.
- Treat `graphify-out/` as advisory navigation context only when present; it is not authoritative source material.

## Scope

This LLM Wiki is repo-local only. It defines a generated tracked repo-local path index, but it does not define a public website, `llms-full.txt`, Graphify publication pipeline, external model call, deployment workflow, or Docker runtime behavior.
